languages.text: "Погодите-ка... Все было не так! Что за ведьмовство? Нет... я отказываюсь верить!"

traits.locale_text: "Погодите-ка... Все было не так! Что за ведьмовство? Нет... я отказываюсь верить!"

languages.text: "Wait a minute... It wasn't like that! What sorcery is this? No... I refuse to believe it!"

languages.text: "Moment mal ... So war es nicht! Was für eine Hexerei ist das? Nein ... Ich weigere mich, das zu glauben!"
languages.original_text: "Wait a minute... It wasn't like that! What sorcery is this? No... I refuse to believe it!"

languages.original_text: "Wait a minute... It wasn't like that! What sorcery is this? No... I refuse to believe it!"

languages.text: « Attendez une minute... Il y a quelque chose qui cloche ! Quelle est cette sorcellerie ? Non... Je refuse d'y croire ! »
languages.original_text: "Wait a minute... It wasn't like that! What sorcery is this? No... I refuse to believe it!"

traits.locale_text: « Attendez une minute... Il y a quelque chose qui cloche ! Quelle est cette sorcellerie ? Non... Je refuse d'y croire ! »

languages.text: «Un momento... ¡no fue así como pasó! ¿Qué brujería es esta? No... ¡me niego a creerlo!».
languages.original_text: "Wait a minute... It wasn't like that! What sorcery is this? No... I refuse to believe it!"

traits.locale_text: «Un momento... ¡no fue así como pasó! ¿Qué brujería es esta? No... ¡me niego a creerlo!».

languages.text: "Bir dakika... Öyle olmadı! Bu nasıl bir sahirlik? Hayır... İnanmayı reddediyorum!"
languages.original_text: "Wait a minute... It wasn't like that! What sorcery is this? No... I refuse to believe it!"

traits.locale_text: "Bir dakika... Öyle olmadı! Bu nasıl bir sahirlik? Hayır... İnanmayı reddediyorum!"

languages.text: 「ちょっと待って…そんなわけじゃない！何の魔法だ！いや…信じたくない！」
languages.original_text: "Wait a minute... It wasn't like that! What sorcery is this? No... I refuse to believe it!"

traits.locale_text: 「ちょっと待って…そんなわけじゃない！何の魔法だ！いや…信じたくない！」
